purpose: P1 converts each single geometry source in S1 into a program-manipulable geometry runtime object. P1 does not perform IUT mediation; that belongs to P2.

design_rule.core_definition: P1 is the first program layer. It compiles S1 geometry-first records into runtime geometry objects with object/relation/operation models.

field_notes.compiled_from: S1 source id that generated this program object.
field_notes.runtime_type: High-level program runtime family for this geometry.
field_notes.object_model: Program-level object abstraction generated from S1 core objects.
field_notes.relation_model: Program-level relation abstraction generated from S1 core relations.
field_notes.operation_stubs: Program-callable operations generated from S1 required operations.
field_notes.serialization_format: How this runtime object can be serialized for downstream layers.
field_notes.verification_contract: Checks required for accepting this P1 object as valid.
field_notes.ready_for_p2: Boolean indicating that this single-geometry runtime object is ready for IUT-mediated P2 use.
